name: Tower Blocks Deluxe 3D
description: Build your tower, block by block, in Tower Blocks Deluxe 3D! Carefully drop each block on top of the next and watch your skyscraper rise higher and higher into the sky. But be careful; one bad move and your tower could come crashing down! Test your timing, precision, and reflexes as the challenge gets harder with every level. How high can you build? Can you reach the moon? With smooth 3D visuals, satisfying gameplay, and endless tower-building fun, Tower Blocks Deluxe 3D is easy to play but impossible to put down!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
